_meta.voice: TBD — will use default (Mapendo) via eleven_multilingual_v2 unless ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID_LG is set
_meta.notes: TEMPLATE ONLY — values below must be replaced with native-speaker translations before audio can be generated. The narration script refuses to run on any scene whose value contains the [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] marker. See docs/project/TRANSLATION_TODO.md for the workflow and acceptance criteria.
workflow: 1. Commission native Luganda speaker(s) to translate each scene A1..B2 below.
2. Translator replaces the placeholder string (keep [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] markers removed) with the Luganda rendering.
3. Second native speaker reviews for accuracy + field-appropriate register (rural Ugandan farmers, not urban Kampala).
4. PI signs off on the final text.
5. Paste finalized text into this file; remove the _meta.status='template' flag (set to 'production').
7. Native speaker listens to generated audio; iterate on voice selection if pronunciation is off (see ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID_LG in .env.example).

A1: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Welcome to the farming game. You will play three seasons...
A2: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Your harvest depends on the rains...
A3: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Each season, you receive twenty five tokens...
A4: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] You can buy fertilizer for your farm...
A5: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] But if the rains are bad, your crops fail...
A6: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Here is how to play. Your tokens start in the lockbox...
A7A: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] You have one more season to play (Version A — seeds + optional insurance)...
A7B: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] You have one more season to play (Version B — seeds bundled with insurance)...
B1: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Seeds cost ten tokens. Insurance costs two tokens more...
B2: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] The improved seeds cost twelve tokens. This price includes insurance...
